arguments.text: Julian built Mirror Brain as an AI memory system using DeepSeek and Neo4j
Romina designed the user interface with React components and Tailwind styling
Docker containers run the entire stack: c0, Neo4j, Ollama, and the MCP server
The deployment pipeline includes GitHub Actions CI/CD and Hostinger hosting
Ollama runs nomic-embed-text locally for embeddings without external API calls
The consolidation engine compresses daily entries into weekly and monthly summaries
Procedural memory learns workflows from repeated action patterns in reasoning_trail
The predictive engine uses linear regression on emotional metrics over 30-day windows
Julian creo Mirror Brain como sistema de memoria con agentes autonomos
Romina Gonzalez es la persona mas importante en la vida de Gustavo
El motor c0 esta escrito en Rust y se comunica con Neo4j mediante Bolt
Los embeddings semanticos usan nomic-embed-text con Ollama local
El pipeline de consolidacion comprime dias en semanas y meses automaticamente
La memoria procedural aprende flujos de trabajo observando patrones repetidos
